scenarios.name: Payment webhook with retries and DLQ
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scaffolds Express with express.raw, enqueues to a BullMQ webhookQueue with attempts:5 and exponential backoff delay:3000, verifies HMAC-SHA256 in a Worker that throws to trigger retries, and logs dead letters when attemptsMade>=5; baseline returns 200 but processes synchronously with no queue, no exponential backoff config, and no DLQ hook.

scenarios.name: Repo push webhook with commit-SHA idempotency
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the commit SHA as BullMQ jobId for natural dedup, plus the redis.set(key,'1','EX',86400,'NX') isProcessed check with 24h TTL described in the skill; baseline uses an in-memory Set or no dedup at all and skips the BullMQ jobId pattern that prevents duplicate enqueues.
